caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting for a podcast. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a patterned bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background includes a wall with framed art and a banner that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." On-screen text appears in two locations: a logo on the left says "#FESTALK PODCAST" and text on the right says "BESTALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking slightly downward and to the side. In the final frame, he begins to move his right arm and hand toward the bottom right of the screen. The lighting is bright and consistent, and the camera angle remains a steady medium shot of the man from the chest up.
